General.Name: Ziyuanyuan Holdings Group
General.Description: Ziyuanyuan Holdings Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides medical equipment finance leasing services in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Finance Leasing Service, Postpartum Care Service, and Trading Business segments. The company offers direct finance leasing and sale-leaseback services. It also provides maternal and child postpartum care industry services; and technological services, as well as trades in medical equipment and consumables. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China. Ziyuanyuan Holdings Group Limited is a subsidiary of Hero Global Limited.
General.Address: Block A, Majialong Innovation Building, Shenzhen, China
